description_long: This is a high-top sneaker featuring a warm brown upper made from a combination of leather and textile materials. The shoe has a padded collar and tongue for comfort, with light beige laces threaded through metal eyelets. The midsole is white with a slightly raised heel and a brown outsole, providing a sporty yet urban look. There are small orange and blue fabric tags on the side, and a vertical pull tab with circular logos on the heel. The interior appears to be lined with a soft, light gray fabric for added comfort. The overall design is robust and stylish, suitable for everyday urban wear.
description: A brown high-top sneaker with beige laces, white midsole, padded collar, and subtle branding details, designed for urban use.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the padded collar, vertical pull tab with circular logos, and heel details.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the brown leather and textile upper, orange and blue tags, and white midsole.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the beige laces, padded tongue with a logo patch, and rounded toe.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the shoe's profile and construction details.
attribute_logo: circular logo on heel pull tab and tongue patch, both in white on gray background
